text: Quick read on the portfolio — anything I should worry about today?

Net liquidation is $50K with no leverage (1.0x) and a 75% cushion — very comfortable. Daily P&L is +$125 (+0.25% of NLV). Positions are balanced with no single name over ~21%, and there are no earnings inside the next week, so event risk is quiet. Nothing actionable today.
What would a 20% equity drawdown do to my margin?

A -20% equity shock on ~$49K gross takes roughly $9.7K off NLV (about -19%), but with no margin the cushion barely moves — it stays around 76% and leverage holds near 1.0x. Margin-call risk is low; an unleveraged book just rides a drawdown out, so there's nothing to pre-trim ahead of it.
